title: Klaviyo vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Omnisend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool is best for your ecommerce business.
h1: Klaviyo vs Omnisend: Complete Comparison for Ecommerce
intro: Both Klaviyo and Omnisend are powerful email and SMS marketing platforms designed for ecommerce brands. While they share similar core functionality, they differ in pricing, feature depth, and ideal use cases. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your marketing needs and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Predictive analytics, ecommerce integrations, advanced segmentation
comparison_table.tool_b: Omnichannel approach, push notifications, pre-built workflows

choose_a_if: You need advanced predictive analytics and AI-driven customer insights for ecommerce
You're using Shopify or WooCommerce and want deep platform integrations
You prioritize sophisticated segmentation and automation workflows over budget
choose_b_if: You want the most affordable entry point with solid omnichannel capabilities
You need push notifications alongside email and SMS in one platform
You prefer pre-built workflows and product picker features for quick setup

faq.a: Klaviyo offers more advanced features and predictive analytics, making it better for sophisticated ecommerce operations. However, Omnisend provides better value for budget-conscious users and has superior customer satisfaction scores on Trustpilot. The best choice depends on whether you prioritize feature depth or cost-effectiveness.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is significantly cheaper, starting at $16/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Omnisend also offers a larger free tier contact limit (250 vs 500 is actually Omnisend's smaller tier, but lower paid entry price offers better value). For budget-conscious startups, Omnisend is the more affordable option.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate between platforms, though the process requires exporting your contact lists and recreating workflows. Both platforms support standard data export formats, but you'll need to manually rebuild your automation sequences and campaigns in the new platform. Plan for migration time during the transition.
